ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date of the initial public offering */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* The date of the last trade */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* The last traded price of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* The price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* The beta of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the return data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the return data */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Monthly return value */,
  "equal_weighted" REAL /* Equal-weighted return */,
  "value_weighted" REAL /* Value-weighted return */,
  "price_weighted" REAL /* Price-weighted return */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of shares traded in the month */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock in the month */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock in the month */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the stock at the beginning of the month */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the stock at the end of the month */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividends paid during the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_returns_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the portfolio */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* The risk profile of the portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* The investment strategy */,
  "last_rebalance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last portfolio rebalance */,
  "target_return" REAL /* The target return for the portfolio */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* The primary benchmark ID for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the portfolio allocated to the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "weight_in_portfolio" REAL /* The weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The dividend yield of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* The date of the last trade for the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* The last traded price of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the performance data */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Monthly return value of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio */,
  "total_return" REAL /* The total return of the portfolio */,
  "cumulative_return" REAL /* The cumulative return of the portfolio */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* The maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* The value at risk (VaR) of the portfolio */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* The expected shortfall of the portfolio */,
  "tracking_error" REAL /* The tracking error of the portfolio */,
  "information_ratio" REAL /* The information ratio of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* The job title of the user */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the user was hired */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* The location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark index */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark index */,
  "index_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benchmark index */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the benchmark is denominated */,
  "geography" TEXT /* The geographical region the benchmark covers */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* The asset class the benchmark represents */,
  "index_methodology" TEXT /* The methodology used to calculate the benchmark */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* The date of the last update to the benchmark data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_benchmarks" (
  "portfolio_benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio benchmark record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark index */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benchmark association */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benchmark association */,
  "weight_in_portfolio" REAL /* The weight of the benchmark in the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the benchmark association */,
  "performance_data_source" TEXT /* The source of the performance data for the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_benchmarks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_benchmarks_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "fees" REAL /* Transaction fees */,
  "transaction_cost" REAL /* The total cost of the transaction */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* The date the transaction was settled */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* The source of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_transactions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, risk) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report */,
  "report_size_bytes" INTEGER /* The size of the report in bytes */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* The URL to access the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
